ApiKey_ClaudeKeyRequired: Please enter your Anthropic API key.
ApiKey_InvalidFormat: Invalid key format. Anthropic keys start with 'sk-ant-'.
Update_Message: A new version is available. Update is required to continue using BIBIM.
Update_DefaultReleaseNotes:
- New features
- Bug fixes
- Performance improvements
Update_CloseConfirmQuestion:
You cannot use BIBIM without updating.
Do you really want to exit?
Update_InstallStartedMessage:
Installer launched.
Please close Revit before proceeding.
Chat_AnalyzeTooltip: Diagnose the currently opened Dynamo graph and suggest solutions.
Chat_WelcomeBody: Describe the logic you need, or click the [Analysis] button if there is an issue in your current node graph.
Chat_WelcomeHint: Example: "Create logic to sum selected wall areas."
Chat_VersionMismatchWarning: This conversation was created in Revit {0}. Code may not work in your current Revit {1} environment.
Analysis_ResponseTruncated: Analysis report was truncated due to token limit.
Code_ResponseTruncated: Response was truncated by token limit. If execution fails, ask for regeneration with shorter output.
ViewModel_DynNotSupportedTitle: .dyn direct export is not supported yet.
ViewModel_DynNotSupportedBody: BIBIM works by automatically adding a Python Script node to the currently opened Dynamo workspace. Describe the logic you need, and it will generate and inject code to the canvas.
ViewModel_DynNotSupportedHint: To save the generated graph as .dyn, press Ctrl+S in Dynamo.
ViewModel_QuestionsIntro: A few checks are needed before generating code:
ViewModel_SpecCreatedNotification: Code specification created. Please review it.
ViewModel_NoSpecToConfirm: There is no specification to confirm.
ViewModel_CodeGeneratingInProgress: Code and node generation is in progress. Please wait.
ViewModel_NoSpecToModify: There is no specification to modify.
ViewModel_RequestChangesBody: Please enter what you want to change in the specification.
ViewModel_RequestChangesHint: Example: "Include curtain walls" or "Change output unit to square feet"
ViewModel_SpecCancelled: Specification canceled. Please enter a new request.
ViewModel_ConfirmedSpecPromptHeader: [Code generation request based on confirmed specification]
ViewModel_GenerateCodeFromSpec: Generate Dynamo Python code based on this specification.
ViewModel_ServerBusy: Claude servers are busy. Please try again.
ViewModel_ServerBusyAlternative: Claude servers are busy. Please try again shortly.
ViewModel_AIServerTemporaryIssue: AI service is temporarily unstable. Please try again shortly.
ViewModel_NodeGeneratedSuccess: Python Script node was automatically added to the canvas
ViewModel_NodeUpdatedSuccess: Existing Python Script node was updated
ViewModel_GroupDescriptionDefault: Python Script node generated by BIBIM AI.
ViewModel_NodeCleanupFallback: Created a new node instead of directly editing the existing one.
ViewModel_NodeCleanupFallbackReason: Created a new node instead of directly editing the existing one. Reason: {0}
ViewModel_NodeCleanupDeleteOld: The updated logic is applied to the new node. After checking connections/results, delete the previous node ({0}).
ViewModel_PythonNodeCreateFailed: Failed to create Python node instance.
ViewModel_GeneralError: An error occurred. Please try again.
ViewModel_NoExistingNodeGuid: No existing node GUID is available.
ViewModel_NodeTypeNotSupported: This node type does not support Python code replacement: {0}
Spec_FallbackParseError: An error occurred while processing the response. Please try again.
Spec_Error_ResponseTruncated: The AI response was too long to process. Try breaking your request into simpler parts.
Spec_Error_InvalidFormat: The AI response format was invalid. Please try again.
Spec_Error_EmptyResponse: No response was received from the AI. Please try again shortly.
Spec_Error_ParseFailed: An error occurred while processing the AI response. Please try again.
ValidationBlock_Header: Code was blocked by automatic validation. Node injection has been stopped.
ValidationBlock_ParseFailed: Could not parse the block reason. Please try again.
ValidationBlock_AutoFixNote: Note: Validation did not pass after {0} auto-fix attempt(s).
ValidationBlock_Action1: 1. Regenerate the request using the suggested candidate symbols.
ValidationBlock_Action2: 2. If needed, use the Graph Analysis button to check current node/error status.
ValidationBlock_Action3: 3. Verify whether version-specific APIs are involved.
RAG_FailureWarning: API documentation search failed. Generating code with base knowledge.
Error_ApiKeyNotConfigured: Claude API key is not configured. Please set claude_api_key in rag_config.json or the CLAUDE_API_KEY environment variable.
Error_ServiceUnavailable: A temporary service issue has occurred. Please try again in a moment.
NodeManipulator_CreatedNodeNotFound: Unable to find the newly created node
NodeManipulator_AddNodeConnectSuccess: Created '{0}' node and connected it to '{1}'
NodeManipulator_ReconnectFailed: Failed to connect to new target
NodeManipulator_NotPythonNode: Not a Python node or code is inaccessible
NodeManipulator_CodePatchNotFound: Unable to find the code snippet to patch
NodeManipulator_NotValueNode: This node type does not support value changes (type: {0})
